(def top (apply max-key :count (sentry__list_issues {:status "unresolved"})))
(def title (get top :title))
(def result {:id (get top :id) :title title :count (get top :count) :project (get top :project) :level (get top :level)})
(email__send_email {:to "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Top error" :body title})
result
"}
